name: parrot-runner
description: Auto-runner: a forward-flying parrot collects fruit. Built like a playable ad.

scripts.build:pages: npm run build:playable && cp pipeline/agentic/dashboard.html dist/dashboard.html
scripts.ci: npm run test:unit && npm run validate:assets && npm run verify:provenance && npm run build:playable && npm run validate:build && npm run test:e2e
scripts.dashboard:refresh: npm run build:playable && IMAGE_PROVIDER=mock npm run pipeline && npm run test:e2e && node pipeline/agentic/generate-tests-report.mjs && node pipeline/agentic/collect-telemetry.mjs --n 3 && node pipeline/agentic/shadow.mjs --asset fruit --n 3 && node pipeline/agentic/visual-eval.mjs; node pipeline/agentic/capture-gif.mjs && node pipeline/agentic/dashboard.mjs
